statements.sql: select `w_roles`.*, `w_role_user`.`user_id` as `pivot_user_id`, `w_role_user`.`role_id` as `pivot_role_id`, `w_role_user`.`created_at` as `pivot_created_at`, `w_role_user`.`updated_at` as `pivot_updated_at` from `w_roles` inner join `w_role_user` on `w_roles`.`id` = `w_role_user`.`role_id` where `w_role_user`.`user_id` in (24) and `w_roles`.`deleted_at` is null
select `game` from `w_stat_game` where `user_id` = 24 group by `game` limit 20
select `id` from `w_games` where (`view` = 1 and `shop_id` = 1) and 0 = 1 and `device` in (1, 2) limit 20
